history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A dynamic anime-style scene shows two people on a boat with one holding a fishing rod while loud sound effects burst across the image.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a pair of people in the foreground standing or leaning on a small boat. The person on the left wears a light-colored outfit and a straw hat with a ribbon, and they hold a fishing rod with both hands. The person on the right wears a green short-sleeved top and a dark cap, standing close with one arm extended across the other person’s body as if assisting or restraining while holding onto the fishing rod area. A fishing line trails toward the lower foreground, and part of the boat’s edge and rods extend across the bottom of the frame.

Setting:
The background shows an outdoor waterfront scene with a blue sky and scattered clouds. Beyond the people is a body of water with gentle waves and a distant shoreline or landmass that appears slightly blurred. Lighting suggests daytime under bright, natural sunlight.

Visual Details:
The image uses vivid colors and bold linework. The person on the left has short, light hair visible under the straw hat and wears a light blue or lavender garment with a ribbon detail around the neck area, along with bracelets and a wristwatch-like accessory. The person on the right has short, light brown or blonde hair visible under the cap and wears a green shirt. Their poses are close together: the right person’s arms cross in front of the left person, and the left person leans forward while gripping the fishing rod. Overlaid graphics include large orange and yellow stylized Japanese-like sound effect characters near the top left and bottom right, and a white speech-bubble-like shape with text near the left-center. The boat area at the bottom appears white, with fishing lines and rod elements drawn in perspective.

Visible Text:
KYAA!

Practical Summary:
The image depicts two people on a boat outdoors, with one holding a fishing rod and the other close by, with exaggerated action lines and sound effects. Large comic-style sound effect text and a speech-bubble-like label emphasize the action.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
